response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. 00:00-00:12 features a song performance by Anya Melfissa. Visual text 'イガク' led to identifying 'Igaku' (Medicine). Search results clarified it is by Sasuke Haraguchi, not PinocchioP as initially assumed. Performed search for 'Igaku Sasuke Haraguchi Japanese and English lyrics'. Remaining segments from 00:13 to end are solely spoken announcements and merchandise presentations.
response.global_summary: A 3D birthday celebration stream where Anya Melfissa performs "Igaku" (originally by Sasuke Haraguchi ft. Kasane Teto), followed by a presentation of her 2025 birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa performs 'Igaku' on a 3D stage while visual text 'イガク' appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(ユ!)
ドクター・キドリです
愛・爆破ッテロ
簡単になれば
埋まった マター
ドクター・キドリです
多分フレンドリー
盲目の狼、貴方を待ってる
(医薬!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Yu!)
I'm playing doctor
Love, explosion, terrorism
If it becomes easy
Buried, matter
I'm playing doctor
Maybe I'm friendly
Blind wolf, I'm waiting for you
(Medicine!)

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa speaks to the audience and showcases her 2025 birthday merchandise.
